sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Applied Materials, Inc. (AMAT) Gained on Strong AI Chip Demand and Resilient Operating Performance
feed.summary: Renaissance Investment Management highlighted Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMAT) in its Q4 2025 investor letter, noting its gains due to strong operating results and resilient demand. The company benefits from robust demand for AI semiconductor chipsets, secular technological transitions, and federal stimulus from the CHIPS Act. Applied Materials is a significant holding for hedge funds, with 111 portfolios holding AMAT at the end of Q4 2025.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Drops 48% in 2026 Despite 40% EPS Growth: Do Analysts See Recovery?
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) stocks have dropped 31% year-to-date, trading at $995, despite a 29% year-over-year increase in credit-scoring revenue in Q1 FY2026. Analysts maintain a bullish stance, with a mean price target of $1,872.18, anticipating an 88.2% upside. The company closed a $1 billion senior notes offering and management expects to beat guidance, driven by software ACV bookings and platform ARR growth.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific completes Clario Holdings acquisition
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has completed its acquisition of Clario Holdings Inc. for $8.875 billion in cash, with potential earnout payments. Clario's expertise in integrating clinical trial endpoint data will enhance Thermo Fisher's clinical research offerings, allowing for faster and more informed drug development. The acquisition is expected to contribute $0.45 to Thermo Fisher's adjusted EPS in the first year and achieve significant synergy realized over five years.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Purchases 37,863 Shares of Snap-On Incorporated $SNA
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly increased its stake in Snap-On Incorporated (NYSE:SNA) by 129.3% in the fourth quarter, acquiring 37,863 additional shares. The firm now holds 67,146 shares of Snap-On, valued at approximately $24.02 million. This move comes amidst mixed insider activity, with 39,650 shares sold by corporate insiders over the last three months, though analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock with an average price target of $377.33.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Decreases Stock Position in Public Storage $PSA
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly reduced its stake in Public Storage (NYSE: PSA) by 43.1% in Q4, selling over 69,000 shares. This comes as several brokerages have downgraded the stock, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $306.53. Public Storage recently announced a quarterly dividend of $3.00, resulting in a 4.5% yield, despite a high payout ratio of 133.04%.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Sells 189,554 Shares of Cintas Corporation $CTAS
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC reduced its stake in Cintas Corporation by 62.3% in Q4, selling 189,554 shares and retaining 114,750 shares worth approximately $21.5 million. The company holds an average analyst rating of "Moderate Buy" with a target price of $220.25, and several brokerages have upgraded their ratings on the stock.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Cuts Stake in Colgate-Palmolive Company $CL
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC reduced its stake in Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) by 16% in Q4, selling 57,264 shares and retaining 301,550 shares valued at $23.28 million. Colgate-Palmolive also exceeded quarterly expectations with an EPS of $0.95 and revenue of $5.23 billion, and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.53.

Analysts currently rate Amcor with a "Moderate Buy" and a consensus price target of $52.25.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Has $27.15 Million Stock Position in American International Group, Inc. $AIG
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly increased its holdings in American International Group (AIG) by 99.3% in Q4, bringing its stake to 317,332 shares valued at $27.15 million. feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly increased its stake in The Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) by 22% to hold shares valued at $24.97 million. feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Sells 23,337 Shares of Williams Companies, Inc. (The) $WMB
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC reduced its stake in Williams Companies, Inc. by 5.3%, selling 23,337 shares and retaining 416,911 shares valued at $24.81 million. feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Purchases 173,013 Shares of VICI Properties Inc. $VICI
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC increased its stake in VICI Properties Inc. by 24.1% during the fourth quarter, purchasing 173,013 additional shares. feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Decreases Position in Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC reduced its holdings in Uber Technologies by 7%, selling over 22,000 shares and now owning 293,164 shares valued at $25.1 million. feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Boosts Holdings in Paychex, Inc. $PAYX
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly increased its stake in Paychex, Inc. by 67% in Q4, now owning 202,446 shares valued at $22.52 million. Despite this, analyst sentiment for Paychex has softened, with a consensus "Reduce" rating and an average price target of $121.38, while the stock trades below its 50- and 200-day moving averages. Paychex has authorized a $1 billion share buyback and continues to pay a quarterly dividend, currently yielding 4.8%.

feed.title: Absci, DigitalOcean And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Wednesday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: Several prominent stocks are projected to open lower in Wednesday's pre-market session. Absci Corp (NASDAQ: ABSI) is down after reporting lower-than-expected quarterly sales, while DigitalOcean Holdings Inc (NYSE: DOCN) declined following a $700 million offering announcement. Other companies experiencing pre-market dips include Intrepid Potash Inc (NYSE: IPI), Pacira Biosciences Inc (NASDAQ: PCRX), Velo3D Inc (NASDAQ: VELO), Sasol Ltd (NYSE: SSL), CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF), and Venture Global Inc (NASDAQ: VG).

feed.title: Costco, NextEra, Valero Energy And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: CNBC's "Final Trades" featured several picks including Costco Wholesale (NASDAQ: COST) due to strong Q2 earnings, iShares US Consumer Discretionary ETF (NYSE: IYC) supported by Oracle's better-than-expected Q3 results, and NextEra Energy (NYSE: NEE) following approval for natural gas power development. Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO) was also highlighted after a price target increase from Goldman Sachs. The article summarizes analyst and investor recommendations for these companies.

feed.title: Alzheimer's drug trial enrolls 144 patients with no serious side effects
feed.summary: ProMIS Neurosciences (Nasdaq: PMN) has successfully completed enrollment for its PRECISE-AD Phase 1b clinical trial, with 144 Alzheimer's patients, surpassing the target of 128. The drug candidate, PMN310, has shown a favorable safety profile with no treatment-related serious adverse events reported to date. The company also secured $75.5 million in upfront financing, providing a cash runway through 2027.

feed.title: American Express Chairman and CEO Stephen J. Squeri Highlights the Company’s 2025 Performance and Position of Strength in an AI-Powered World in Letter to Shareholders
feed.summary: American Express Chairman and CEO Stephen J. Squeri released his annual letter to shareholders, detailing the company's strong performance in 2025. The letter outlines American Express's strategic approach to achieving continued growth and success in an evolving, AI-powered global landscape. It emphasizes the company's commitment to leveraging technology and its brand built on trust and service to deliver value to customers.

feed.title: Purple Biotech uses AI to speed antibody drugs for solid tumors
feed.summary: Purple Biotech announced a collaboration with Converge Bio to utilize generative AI for accelerating the development of its next-generation tri-specific antibody platform for oncology. This partnership aims to enhance the discovery, optimize developability, and expand capabilities against solid-tumor targets. The collaboration will integrate Converge Bio's AI-driven molecule design with Purple Biotech's CAPTN-3 conditional activation technology to generate optimized T cell engagers and high-quality candidates more rapidly.

feed.title: Only five companies earned Gallup distinction; Allegion made the list
feed.summary: Allegion plc has won the Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award for the third consecutive year, and is notably one of only five companies to receive the "With Distinction" honor in 2026. This recognition highlights Allegion's strong, engaged workplace culture, emphasizing employee investment, growth, and high performance. The company's commitment to creating a thriving environment where employees feel valued and heard has been linked to stronger business outcomes, customer satisfaction, and innovation.

feed.title: ADP will post quarterly results before market opens April 29
feed.summary: ADP (Nasdaq: ADP) is scheduled to release its third fiscal quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026, before the Nasdaq open on April 29, 2026. A conference call with CEO Maria Black, CFO Peter Hadley, and VP of Investor Relations Matthew Keating will follow at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. The results and related materials, including a slide presentation, will be made available on the Investor Relations section of adp.com, with a live webcast of the call accessible at investors.adp.com.

feed.title: QT Imaging Reports 2025 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Financial Results
feed.summary: QT Imaging Holdings, Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, reporting record full-year revenue of $18.9 million, exceeding guidance, and shipping 40 scanners. The company affirmed its 2026 revenue guidance of approximately $39 million, driven by distributor partnerships and the QTI Cloud Platform. Key achievements include FDA clearance for an updated scanner configuration, approval of a new Category III CPT code for its Breast Acoustic CT, and significant financial strengthening through a private placement.

feed.title: SLB Industrializes AI for the Energy Industry with NVIDIA
feed.summary: SLB announced an expanded collaboration with NVIDIA to industrialize AI for the energy industry. This partnership will focus on developing modular data center infrastructure for NVIDIA DSX AI factories, creating an "AI Factory for Energy" with domain-specific generative AI models, and optimizing SLB's digital platforms for accelerated computing using NVIDIA AI infrastructure. The goal is to help energy companies deploy AI at scale, transform operational data into actionable insights, and improve performance for more efficient and sustainable energy systems, building on a relationship that began in 2008.
feed.banner_image: https://mms.businesswire.com/media/20260324731936/en/2756593/4/Shreveport_%281%29.jpg (alt: original SLB’s technology center in Louisiana: a 3.1 million square-foot facility dedicated to manufacturing for its modular data center business.)

feed.title: Let the Games Begin: Markets vs. The Fed - Raymond James - Commentaries
feed.summary: This article discusses the ongoing dynamic between financial markets and the Federal Reserve regarding interest rate policy, noting that markets sometimes try to influence the Fed's decisions, and vice-versa. The author highlights current uncertainties, including the Fed's dual focus on employment and inflation, the short leash on inflation, and geopolitical risks impacting gasoline prices. Eugenio J. Alemán suggests that while the Fed aims to avoid surprising markets, it can act decisively when potential problems are brewing.

feed.title: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Arm Holdings, BorgWarner, Enterprise Products Partners, GM, Mondelez, ONEOK, Vertiv Holdings, and More
feed.summary: This article details Wall Street's top analyst upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for Wednesday, March 25, 2026. It covers analyst calls for companies like Arm Holdings, BorgWarner, Enterprise Products Partners, GM, Mondelez, ONEOK, and Vertiv Holdings, amidst a backdrop of fluctuating market indices, inflation concerns, and geopolitical tensions. The report also provides a brief overview of the previous day's market performance for stocks, bonds, oil, gold, and cryptocurrency.

feed.title: Campbell’s Is Launching a Line of Canned Sauces—and We Can’t Wait to Try Their Butter Chicken Sauce
feed.summary: Campbell's is set to launch a new line of canned sauces in June, leveraging consumers' existing habit of using Campbell's soups in their own recipes. The line will include Creamy Lemon Garlic, Smothered Chicken, Butter Chicken, and Thai Curry flavors, with the latter two representing a more adventurous move for the brand. This initiative aims to build on established customer behavior and introduce globally inspired flavors to a familiar audience.

feed.title: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL Buys 157,574 Shares of The Pennant Group, Inc. $PNTG
feed.summary: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL significantly increased its stake in The Pennant Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:PNTG) by 317.4%, acquiring an additional 157,574 shares to bring its total holding to 207,220 shares valued at $5.23 million. Other institutional investors also raised their positions, leading to 85.88% institutional ownership. This comes after The Pennant Group surpassed its quarterly EPS and revenue estimates and provided positive FY2026 guidance.

(NYSE:PRK) by 51.2% in the 3rd quarter, acquiring an additional 10,935 shares to bring its total to 32,285 shares, valued at approximately $5.25 million. This institutional acquisition comes as analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Park National, with a price target of $181.50, and the company recently paid a quarterly dividend of $1.10.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Has $491,000 Stock Position in Assurant, Inc. $AIZ
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd significantly cut its stake in Assurant, Inc. by 87.1% in Q3, leaving it with 2,269 shares valued at approximately $491,000. Despite this reduction, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Assurant, with an average target price of $258.17. The company recently reported strong earnings, beating revenue and EPS estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.88 per share.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: Equifax (EFX), Builders Firstsource (BLDR) and Paccar (PCAR)
feed.summary: Analysts have provided insights on several Industrial Goods companies, including Equifax (EFX), Builders Firstsource (BLDR), and Paccar (PCAR). Wells Fargo maintained a Buy rating for Equifax with a $240 price target, while Stephens kept a Hold rating on Builders Firstsource with a $125 price target. RBC Capital also maintained a Hold rating on Paccar, setting a price target of $125.

feed.title: Metal Recycling Market is expected to Hit US$ 585.94 Billion
feed.summary: The global metal recycling market is projected to reach US$585.94 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 8.5% from its 2025 valuation of US$301.84 billion. This growth is driven by the sustainable benefits of recycling, such as reduced virgin mining and lower energy consumption, supplying key industries like automotive and construction. Recent developments highlight significant investments and collaborations in critical mineral and battery material recycling, particularly in the U.S. and Japan, aiming to enhance domestic capacity and reduce reliance on imports.

feed.title: Moody National Bank Trust Division Has $2.13 Million Position in Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: Moody National Bank Trust Division reduced its stake in Qualcomm Incorporated by 29.4% in the fourth quarter, now holding 12,424 shares valued at approximately $2.13 million. Qualcomm recently announced a $20 billion stock buyback program and a quarterly dividend of $0.89 per share. The company also reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, but has an average "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $168.00.

feed.title: Moody National Bank Trust Division Sells 16,789 Shares of Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO
feed.summary: Moody National Bank Trust Division has decreased its stake in Cisco Systems by 30.8%, selling 16,789 shares and retaining 37,743 shares valued at approximately $2.91 million. Despite this, other hedge funds have increased their positions in Cisco, and analysts generally maintain a positive outlook, with several upgrades. Cisco recently reported strong quarterly earnings, exceeding estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Cummins Inc. $CMI Position Reduced by Moody National Bank Trust Division
feed.summary: Moody National Bank Trust Division has reduced its stake in Cummins Inc. by 29.7% in Q4, selling 1,889 shares. Meanwhile, several company insiders have also sold a significant number of shares recently. Despite these reductions, Cummins beat Q4 earnings and revenue expectations, pays a quarterly dividend, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus analyst rating.

feed.title: Moody National Bank Trust Division Increases Stake in Netflix, Inc. $NFLX
feed.summary: Moody National Bank Trust Division significantly increased its stake in Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) by 646.1% during the fourth quarter, now owning 33,948 shares valued at $3.18 million. Several other institutional investors also boosted their holdings in Netflix, bringing the total institutional ownership to 80.93%. The article also details recent insider stock sales, analyst price targets, and key news impacting Netflix's stock and sentiment.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc. $CAT Shares Sold by Moody National Bank Trust Division
feed.summary: Moody National Bank Trust Division reduced its stake in Caterpillar Inc. by 38.3% in Q4, selling 2,080 shares. Despite this, Caterpillar reported strong earnings, secured major power and data-center orders boosting its backlog, and has received multiple analyst price-target upgrades. However, concerns about its valuation at a 38x P/E and significant insider selling (roughly 135,950 shares) indicate mixed risk.

feed.title: Moody National Bank Trust Division Cuts Stake in Citigroup Inc. $C
feed.summary: Moody National Bank Trust Division significantly reduced its holdings in Citigroup Inc. by 32.5% during the fourth quarter, selling 14,505 shares and bringing its total ownership to 30,128 shares valued at $3,516,000. Other institutional investors showed varied activity, with some increasing and others initiating stakes. The article also covers recent insider selling by Cantu Ernesto Torres, analyst ratings, and Citigroup's latest quarterly financials and dividend announcement.

feed.title: Medtronic inks distribution deal for Merit Medical’s basivertebral ablation system
feed.summary: Medtronic has signed a strategic distribution agreement with Merit Medical for its ViaVerte basivertebral nerve ablation (BVNA) system, designed to treat chronic lower-back pain. This deal strengthens Medtronic's pain franchise and puts it in competition with similar solutions from Boston Scientific and Stryker. The ViaVerte system recently received FDA clearance and is expected to be commercially available later in 2026.

feed.title: Bank of America Corporation $BAC Shares Sold by Moody National Bank Trust Division
feed.summary: Moody National Bank Trust Division recently reduced its stake in Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) by 30.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 30,989 shares and holding 70,353 shares valued at $3.87 million. Other institutional investors showed mixed activity, with some increasing their holdings while insiders Bernard A. Mensah and Thomas M. Scrivener sold large blocks of shares. Analysts currently rate BAC as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $59.87.

feed.title: Investors pour $60M into Ovid Therapeutics to advance seizure drugs
feed.summary: Ovid Therapeutics has secured $60 million in investment to further its work on seizure drugs, marking its second private investment in public equity (PIPE) deal in recent months. This funding highlights continued investor interest in the company's pharmaceutical developments. The article also touches on other business news, including strong Manhattan luxury home sales and changes in New York's outdoor dining policies.

feed.title: Moody National Bank Trust Division Sells 15,913 Shares of Wells Fargo & Company $WFC
feed.summary: Moody National Bank Trust Division has reduced its holdings in Wells Fargo & Company by 30.4%, selling 15,913 shares and now owning 36,441 shares worth $3.396 million. Other institutional investors have made various adjustments to their positions, with 75.90% of the stock owned by institutional investors and hedge funds. The article also provides details on Wells Fargo's stock performance, recent earnings, dividend announcements, analyst ratings, and insider trading activity.

feed.title: Wells Fargo upgrades Oneok stock rating on Iran war opportunities
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has upgraded Oneok Inc (NYSE:OKE) to Overweight from Equal Weight, raising its price target to $100 from $81. The upgrade is based on expectations that Oneok will exceed its 2026 guidance and 2027 consensus estimates, driven by spread-based opportunities related to the Iran war. The midstream energy company also boasts a 4.71% dividend yield and a 56-year history of dividend payments.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Customers Can Get Help with Seasonal Energy Bills
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Electric Company (FE PA) is offering various bill assistance programs to help customers manage higher energy costs due to winter's cold. These programs include PCAP, LIHEAP, WARM, and the Dollar Energy Fund, aiming to prevent disconnections and lower bills for eligible customers across its service territories in Pennsylvania.

feed.title: Lee Johnson Capital Management LLC Purchases 5,944 Shares of Quanta Services, Inc. $PWR
feed.summary: Lee Johnson Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) during the fourth quarter, purchasing 5,944 additional shares, bringing its total holdings to 8,006 shares valued at $3.379 million. The construction company recently reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations for EPS and revenue, and announced a quarterly dividend. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Quanta Services with an average price target of $576.55, reflecting institutional investor confidence and positive financial performance.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin To Quadruple Precision Strike Missile Output After First Combat Use In Iran War
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin announced it will quadruple the production of its Precision Strike Missiles (PrSM) following a new agreement with the U.S. Department of War. This decision comes after the U.S. Central Command confirmed the PrSM's first combat use in the ongoing Iran war. The increased production builds on a previous $4.94 billion contract awarded in March 2025.

feed.title: True Random Number Generator Market Is Going to Boom |• Intel Corporation • IBM Corporation
feed.summary: Worldwide Market Reports has released a comprehensive research study on the True Random Number Generator market, forecasting its growth from 2026-2033. The report analyzes key market drivers, challenges, opportunities, and restraints, providing insights into the competitive landscape, regional trends, and market segmentation. It aims to assist stakeholders and investors in making informed decisions regarding the global True Random Number Generator market.

feed.title: General Motors starts tests of “eyes-off” automated driving
feed.summary: General Motors has commenced supervised public-road testing of its next-generation "eyes-off" automated driving technology on limited-access highways in California and Michigan, utilizing over 200 development vehicles. This move signifies a shift from manual data collection to active testing of automated functions, building on over a million miles of data collected previously. GM plans to introduce this capability in 2028, starting with the Cadillac ESCALADE IQ, and eventually expand it from highways to driveway-to-driveway functionality across various models.

feed.title: 20,303 Shares in First Solar, Inc. $FSLR Purchased by Lee Johnson Capital Management LLC
feed.summary: Lee Johnson Capital Management LLC recently purchased 20,303 shares of First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) valued at approximately $5.3 million, making it a new significant holding for the firm. Despite this institutional accumulation, company insiders have been net sellers, offloading 75,989 shares worth about $14.9 million in the last three months. First Solar reported a mixed Q4 earnings with revenue beating estimates but EPS missing, and faces a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating along with a potential legal investigation.
